slides.headline: A tiler we work with sent loads of quotes — and heard nothing back.
No time to chase.
slides.body: So every 'maybe' quietly turned into a 'no' by default.

slides.headline: The jobs went to whoever followed up.
slides.body: Usually not him — he was on his knees grouting, not on his phone.

slides.headline: We set up automatic follow-up + instant enquiry replies.
slides.body: Every quote gets chased, every new enquiry answered in seconds.

slides.headline: The 'maybes' that used to vanish now turn into booked jobs.
Quotes going cold?
slides.save: Save this if your follow-up is 'when I get a minute'
